summary: Director Mission Control Visual Refinements Testing Complete. All 8 requirements verified. All features working correctly.

issues: TEST_REFACTOR text appears in alerts - appears to be test/seed data in production. Consider filtering or using cleaner seed data.

critical_code_review_comments: Requirement #1 - Need Attention KPI: ✓ Red color (#FF6B6B), 42px font, AlertTriangle icon when value > 0
Requirement #2 - Program Brief Empty State: ✓ Explanatory text present ('Generate a strategic overview...') before Generate Brief button
Requirement #3 - Needs Attention Grouping: ✓ Alerts grouped by CATEGORY_CONFIG (Event Prep Risk shows 4 athletes grouped)
Requirement #4 - Quick Action Buttons: ✓ Implemented for single items, grouped items use clickable rows with Eye icon hover
Requirement #5 - Coach Health Cards: ✓ Grid layout, colored status badges (Active=green, Activating=yellow, Inactive=red), athlete counts, activity info
Requirement #6 - Recruiting Signals: ✓ Trend arrows (TrendingUp/Minus icons) visible next to metrics
Requirement #7 - Upcoming Events: ✓ Progress bars (color-coded), first event has bg-slate-50/40 highlight, simplified labels (Tomorrow, 3 days, 1 week)
Requirement #8 - Section Spacing: ✓ space-y-8 applied to DirectorView container
Activity Feed: ✓ Typed icons (star=interest, file=note, message=response, alert=inactivity), max 6 items enforced
Coach Mission Control: ✓ Unchanged and working - has Today's Actions, My Roster, no Director-only sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 Director Mission Control visual refinements verified working. Key features: 1) Need Attention KPI uses #FF6B6B red, 42px font, AlertTriangle icon, 2) Program Brief empty state has explanatory paragraph, 3) Needs Attention groups alerts by CATEGORY_CONFIG.group field, 4) Quick action buttons (View, Nudge/Assign) show for SINGLE items only - grouped items use clickable rows, 5) Coach Health shows grid cards with colored status badges, 6) Upcoming Events has progress bars and first event highlight, 7) Recruiting Signals has trend arrows, 8) Section spacing is space-y-8. Coach MC unchanged with Today's Actions and My Roster.

requirement_1_need_attention_kpi.details: Red color rgb(255, 107, 107) = #FF6B6B, font-size 42px, AlertTriangle icon when value > 0

requirement_2_program_brief_empty_state.details: Shows explanatory text 'Generate a strategic overview of the program including athlete momentum, coach activity, recruiting signals, and event readiness' before Generate Brief button

requirement_3_needs_attention_grouping.details: Alerts grouped by category - EVENT PREP RISK shows '4 athletes' grouped together

requirement_4_quick_action_buttons.details: Quick action buttons (View, Nudge/Assign Coach) implemented for SINGLE items. Grouped items show clickable rows with Eye icon on hover

requirement_5_coach_health_cards.details: Grid layout, Activating status with yellow badge and dot, athlete counts (12, 10, 1), activity info shown

requirement_6_recruiting_signals_trends.details: TrendingUp (green) and Minus (slate) trend arrows visible next to metrics

requirement_7_upcoming_events.details: Progress bars (40%, 100%, 0%), first event bg-slate-50/40 highlight, simplified labels (Tomorrow, 3 days, 6 days, 1 week)

requirement_8_section_spacing.details: space-y-8 class applied to DirectorView container

activity_feed_typed_icons.details: Max 6 items, typed icons with amber (interest), violet (note) backgrounds

coach_mc_unchanged.details: Coach Mission Control loads correctly with Today's Actions and My Roster, no Director-only sections (Coach Health, Recruiting Signals)
